title: It’s Such an Interesting World
overview: Eleven-year-old orphan Anne goes to live with her new family, only to discover that they expected a boy.

title: I Love Pretty Things
overview: Anne rejoices in her new life at Green Gables, but unkind words from Mrs. Lynde spark a stormy confrontation.

title: Looking Forward to Things Is Half the Pleasure of Them
overview: Anne thrills in anticipation of her first picnic, but a lost brooch puts her dreams in jeopardy.

title: One Can’t Stay Sad Very Long in Such an Interesting World
overview: Anne invites Diana to tea, but a mix-up with bottles could make it their last meeting as friends.

title: Let Us Look on the Bright Side of Things
overview: Newly twelve-year-old Anne comes to grief in an affair of honor. Matthew insists on puffed sleeves.

title: I Thought Nothing Could Be as Bad as Red Hair
overview: The story club is formed. Then, Anne's vanity leads to vexation of spirit.

title: I’ve Been Making Mistakes, but Each Mistake Has Helped to Cure Me of My Shortcomings
overview: Anne becomes an unfortunate lily maid, and the Queen's class is organized.

title: I Don’t Want to Be Anyone but Myself
overview: The pass list is out. Anne celebrates at the hotel concert.

title: Next to Trying and Winning, the Best Thing Is Trying and Failing
overview: Anne becomes a Queen's girl and spends the winter at Queen's, chasing the glory and the dream.

title: I Don’t Know What Lies Around the Bend, but I’m Going to Believe That the Best Does
overview: After the reaper whose name is Death touches her life, Anne comes to the bend in the road.

title: I’d Like to Add Some Beauty to Life
overview: Anne becomes a full-fledged schoolma'am and encounters all sorts and conditions of men... and women.

title: Perhaps We Always Love Best the People Who Need Us
overview: Marilla adopts twins, and one, Davy, goes in search of a sensation.

title: When I Think Something Nice Is Going to Happen, I Seem to Fly Right Up on the Wings of Anticipation
overview: After a chapter of accidents, Anne gets her wish in the way it often happens.

title: It Is Never Too Late for the Real Prince to Come for the True Princess
overview: Anne meets sweet Miss Lavendar and learns the story of her romance over an afternoon at the stone house.

title: I’ll Come From the Ends of the Earth If Necessary
overview: Anne wonders what lies around the bend in her road and attends a wedding at the stone house.

title: It’s Nicer Not to Know
overview: The shadow of change leads to greetings and farewells as Anne sets off for Redmond College.

title: Love Is the Power That Transforms Everything
overview: After letters from home and a day in the park, Anne goes home again and gets her first proposal.

title: I Feel as If I Had Opened a Book and Found Roses of Yesterday, Sweet and Beloved, Between Its Leaves
overview: Anne deals with an unwelcome lover and a welcome friend, visits Patty's Place, and finds roses of yesterday.

title: I’ll Walk the Road to Heaven From Here
overview: Anne writes "Averil's Atonement," and an old friend receives the summons that may not be evaded.

title: My World Has Tumbled Into Pieces
overview: Relationships are adjusted, Gilbert speaks, and spring and Anne return to Green Gables.

title: Has the Real Prince Come at Last...?
overview: Enter Jonas, enter Prince Charming, enter Christine.

title: How Horrible It Is That People Have to Grow Up, and Marry, and Change!
overview: After mutual confidences, Anne spends a June evening at Green Gables and attends Diana's wedding.

title: I Have Learned to Look Upon Each Little Hindrance as a Jest and Each Great One as the Foreshadowing of Victory
overview: Anne and her friends receive the Gardners' call and become full-fledged B.A.s.

title: It’s the Birthday of Our Happiness
overview: After a false dawn, Anne comes to a book of revelation in her life, and love takes up the glass of time.
